summary: Listeners love the seamless three‑stage concatenation and overall sound, giving it top marks despite no detailed musical commentary.
review: All three reviewers awarded five stars, highlighting Dan’s concatenated file approach as a smooth listening experience and expressing strong personal enthusiasm for the recording. The comments contain no specific remarks about performance quality, song selection, or technical fidelity, so the positive rating is based on general enjoyment rather than detailed analysis.

ai_rating.rationale: Uniform 5‑star ratings indicate strong overall approval, but reviewers provide no concrete details about sound quality or musical performance, limiting precision of the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the recording as sounding great and praise the seamless concatenation of the three sets, but give no specifics on soundboard vs. audience source or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not comment on set structure, pacing, or individual song performance.
